name: Heroku

naming.description: Standard POSIX. Heroku auto-sets PORT, DATABASE_URL (when Postgres addon attached), etc.

limits.notes: Total combined size of all config vars must be ≤ 32 KB. Individual key/value sizes are not explicitly limited beyond the total.

notes: Config vars are exposed to all dynos at runtime. Use Heroku's built-in config for most cases. For shared secrets across apps, consider Vault or Doppler.
